name: cybersecurity-starter
description: Starter external plugin pack for cybersecurity-oriented workflows

performance.name: finding-signal-quality
performance.description: Generate high-signal, reproducible findings with clear evidence
success_criteria: Findings include target, vector, and impact
Each finding includes at least one evidence artifact

performance.name: false-positive-control
performance.description: Avoid speculative claims and clearly mark confidence

environment.name: security-assessment-workspace
environment.description: Repository and textual inputs used to triage and report cybersecurity findings

actuators.name: cyber_triage
actuators.description: Convert raw observations into structured candidate findings

actuators.name: cyber_report_outline
actuators.description: Build a concise security report outline from findings
